name: AlsoKnownAsAttribute
summary: The AlsoKnownAs attribute allows the node implementor to define an array of names that this node might have had in the past.

constructors.name: AlsoKnownAsAttribute(string[])
constructors.summary: Constructs AlsoKnownAsAttribute with defined old names.

params.name: values
params.doc: Old names, that node used to have.

properties.name: Values
properties.summary: Old names, that node used to have.
